title: Rajesh Gupta Appointed Dean of School of Computing, Information and Data Sciences (HDSI)
snippet: Rajesh K. Gupta, a distinguished computer scientist and seasoned academic leader, has been named founding dean of the School of Computing, Information and Data Sciences (SCIDS). The school was established at UC San Diego in 2024 with an emphasis on research and education in AI, computing, and data science.
match_reason: websearch (press_quote) — HDSI site version of Gupta dean appointment announcement; discusses AI and data science focus of the school.

title: UC San Diego names Rajesh K. Gupta as founding dean of SCIDS
snippet: Gupta will lead SCIDS in advancing interdisciplinary research, expanding academic programs, fostering industry and global partnerships, the University said in a statement.
match_reason: websearch (press_quote) — New India Abroad coverage of Gupta's appointment as founding dean of SCIDS; AI and computing are core to the school.

title: Rajesh K. Gupta appointed founding dean of UC San Diego's School of Computing, Information and Data Sciences
snippet: Established in 2024, SCIDS focuses on advancing research and education in artificial intelligence (AI), computing, and data science—fields that are transforming many aspects of society. Rajesh K. Gupta is the founding dean of UC San Diego's new SCIDS.
match_reason: websearch (press_quote) — AI training news site coverage of Gupta's SCIDS appointment; explicitly discusses AI as a core focus area.

title: Positions, Ep. 4 "AI Literacy and the Changing Digital Political Landscape"
snippet: Episode 4 of the Lateral podcast series Positions, featuring Rita Raley in a discussion on AI literacy and the changing digital political landscape.
match_reason: websearch (podcast) — Rita Raley is a named participant/speaker in this Lateral podcast episode on AI literacy, published May 19, 2025
